name: canvas-node
title: Canvas Node
description: Shared canvas node chrome with frame, surface, layout, status, drag, expand, connector, copyable-row, metrics, actions, and card primitives

files.content:
export type {
  CanvasNodeActions,
  CanvasNodeConnectionEvent,
  CanvasNodeConnectionSide,
  CanvasNodeContextValue,
  CanvasNodeCopyableRowKey,
  CanvasNodeCopyableRowProps,
  CanvasNodeCopyableRowState,
  CanvasNodeCopyFeedbackScopeProps,
  CanvasNodeCopyFeedbackValue,
  CanvasNodeInteractionState,
  CanvasNodeMeta,
  CanvasNodeRootProps,
  CanvasNodeState,
  CanvasNodeStatus,
  CanvasNodeVisualStatusTone,
} from "./canvas-node";
// biome-ignore lint/performance/noBarrelFile: canvas-node public package surface
export { CanvasNode } from "./canvas-node";
